hero.title: Engineered solutions for healthcare equipment
hero.lead: Scroll to explore modular hospital bed planks, frames, and tray systems — designed for production reliability and patient-care applications.

cta.title: Ready to develop your industrial program?
cta.text: Share your CAD data and volume requirements — our team will respond with a proposal aligned to quality, tooling, and delivery expectations.

categories.label: Hospital Bed
categories.summary: Modular planks, frames, and tray systems.

steps.title: Hospital Bed
steps.name: Modular bed assembly
steps.description: Explore injection-molded hospital bed modules — plank tops, base frames, and tray systems engineered for healthcare equipment programs.

steps.title: Hospital Bed
steps.name: Foot Plank Top F-1
steps.description: Foot-section plank top with contoured surface and raised edge profiles for patient support.

steps.title: Hospital Bed
steps.name: X Ray Tray
steps.description: Radiolucent X-ray tray module for imaging compatibility with slim profile and edge retention features.

steps.title: Hospital Bed
steps.name: 7 in Abdomen Plank Top
steps.description: Seven-inch abdomen plank top with recessed contour for comfort and module alignment.

steps.title: Hospital Bed
steps.name: 7 in Abdomen Base Frame
steps.description: Abdomen base frame with integrated bosses and through-holes for plank retention and actuator interfaces.

steps.title: Hospital Bed
steps.name: 10 in Thigh Plank Top F-1
steps.description: Ten-inch thigh plank top with end tabs and oval surface detailing for thigh support.

steps.title: Hospital Bed
steps.name: Head Plank Top
steps.description: Head-section plank top frame with raised side flanges for headboard integration and upper-body support.
